---
title: "USGS DO Metrics"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = F)
options(readr.show_col_types = F)
library(googlesheets4)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpmisc)
library(here)
library(styler)
library(streamMetabolizer)
library(rstan)
options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())
library(dataRetrieval)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)
library(zoo)
library(nasapower)
library(imputeTS)
library(rgbif)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
```

# Find USGS Data

```{r}
# Get site data from USGS
usgsSites <- readNWISsite(c("02264000","02266200","08052700","11128500")) %>%
  transmute(site_no,
            siteName = case_when(
              site_no == "02264000" ~ "Cypress Creek",
              site_no == "02266200" ~ "Whittenhorse Creek",
              site_no == "08052700" ~ "Little Elm Creek",
              site_no == "11128500" ~ "Santa Ynez River"),
            lat = dec_lat_va,
            long = dec_long_va,
            elev = alt_va * 0.3048, # ft to m
            drain_area_va = drain_area_va / 0.38610216) # sqmi to sqkm

# Get start and end dates from USGS
avalDat <- whatNWISdata(siteNumber = usgsSites$site_no, parameterCd = "00300", service = "uv") %>%
  transmute(site_no,
            startDate = begin_date,
            endDate = end_date)

usgsSites <- left_join(usgsSites, avalDat, by = "site_no")
```

## Download DO Data

```{r}
#Leaves one core free for system use
registerDoParallel(cores = detectCores() - 1)

usgsRaw <- foreach(i=1:nrow(usgsSites), .combine='rbind', .packages=c("dataRetrieval")) %dopar% {
  parameterCd <- c("00300", "00010", "00060")
  tempDat <- readNWISuv(usgsSites$site_no[i], parameterCd, usgsSites$startDate[i], usgsSites$endDate[i])
  #Rename cols to make sense
  tempDat <- renameNWISColumns(tempDat)
  return(tempDat)
}
#Stop cluster
stopImplicitCluster()


usgsDat <- usgsRaw %>% 
    transmute(dateTime,
              site_no,
              siteName = factor(
                case_when(
                  site_no == "02264000" ~ "Cypress Creek",
                  site_no == "02266200" ~ "Whittenhorse Creek",
                  site_no == "08052700" ~ "Little Elm Creek",
                  site_no == "11128500" ~ "Santa Ynez River"),
                levels = c("Cypress Creek", "Whittenhorse Creek", "Little Elm Creek", "Santa Ynez River"),
                ordered = T),
              DO.obs = DO_Inst,
              temp.water = Wtemp_Inst,
              Q_cfs = Flow_Inst,
              Q_cms = round(Q_cfs * 0.028316847, 4), # Convert CFS to CMS and round to Ten-Thousandths to match usgs 0
              flowQuantile = rank(Q_cms) / n()) %>%  
    drop_na() %>% 
    arrange(siteName, dateTime)

interpolated_df <- usgsDat %>%
  group_by(siteName) %>%
  do({
    site_data <- .
    
    # Generate a complete 15-minute sequence for the date range of this site
    time_sequence <- data.frame(
      dateTime = seq(from = min(site_data$dateTime), 
                     to = max(site_data$dateTime), 
                     by = "15 min")
    )
    
    # Left join with the original data
    site_data <- left_join(time_sequence, site_data, by = "dateTime")
    
    # Interpolate missing data using `across` with `maxgap` parameter
    site_data %>%
      mutate(across(c(DO.obs, temp.water, Q_cfs, Q_cms, flowQuantile), 
                    ~ na.approx(., na.rm = FALSE, maxgap = 4)))
  }) %>%
  ungroup()


```

## Check out data

```{r}
usgsDat %>%
  ggplot(aes(dateTime, Q_cms)) +
  geom_line(color = "#0000FF") +
  ylab("Q (cms)") +
  theme_few() +
  geom_rect(data = usgsDat %>% filter(Q_cms <= 0), aes(xmin = dateTime, xmax = dateTime + 1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = +Inf),
    fill = "#ff7f50",
    alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_x_datetime() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ siteName, scales = "free")
```

# Download NASA

```{r}
#Download shortwave radiation, barometric presssure, and temperature from NASAPower for each site
nasaDat <- list()
for(i in 1:nrow(usgsSites)) {
  #All sky shortwave downward radiation
  cat(paste("Downloading data for", usgsSites$siteName[i],"\n"))
  
  tempDat <- get_power(
    community = "sb",
    pars = c("PSC"),
    temporal_api = "hourly",
    lonlat = c(usgsSites$long[i], usgsSites$lat[i]),
    dates = c(usgsSites$startDate[i], usgsSites$endDate[i]),
    site_elevation = usgsSites$elev[i],
    time_standard = "UTC")
  
  cat(paste("Finished downloading data for", usgsSites$siteName[i], "\n"))
  #Fix date time stamp and convert kilopascals to millibar
  tempDat <- tempDat %>%
    mutate(Time = paste0(str_pad(HR, 2, side = "left", pad = "0"), ":00")) %>% 
    unite("dateTime", YYYYMMDD, Time, sep = " ") %>% 
    mutate(dateTime = ymd_hm(dateTime, tz = "UTC"),
           BP = PSC * 10) %>% 
    select(dateTime, BP)

  # Simply a data frame of date and time running the course of the data set
  min.fill <- data.frame(dateTime = seq(
    from = floor_date(min(tempDat$dateTime), "15 mins"), 
    to = ceiling_date(max(tempDat$dateTime), "15 mins"),
    by = "15 mins"))
  
  # Merge and interpolate gaps
  tempDat <- merge(min.fill, tempDat, by = "dateTime", all = T) %>%
    mutate(siteName = usgsSites$siteName[i],
           BP = na.approx(BP, na.rm = F, maxgap = 5))
  #Save to list
  nasaDat[[i]] <- tempDat
  #Break loop on last iteration
  if(i == nrow(usgsSites)){break}
} 

nasaDat <- do.call(rbind, nasaDat)
nasaDat <- nasaDat %>% 
  arrange(dateTime, siteName)
```

# Merge

```{r}
# Merge usgsDat with nasaDat
allDat <- usgsDat %>% 
  left_join(nasaDat, by = c("dateTime", "siteName")) %>%
  # Get lat and long from usgsSites
  left_join(usgsSites %>% select(siteName, lat, long), by = "siteName") %>% 
  rename(utc.time = dateTime) %>%
  mutate(
    # Calc dissolved oxygen saturation and percentage saturation
    DO.sat = calc_DO_sat(
      temp.water = temp.water,
      pressure.air = BP,
      model = "garcia-benson"),
    # Calc % DO sat
    DO.pctsat = (DO.obs/DO.sat)*100, 
    # Convert UTC time to mean solar time based on longitude
    solar.time = convert_UTC_to_solartime(
      date.time = utc.time, 
      longitude = long,
      time.type = "mean solar"),
    # Determine if it is daytime
    isDaytime = calc_is_daytime(solar.time, lat = lat)) %>% 
  select(utc.time, solar.time, siteName, DO.obs, DO.sat, DO.pctsat, temp.water, BP, isDaytime, Q_cms) %>% 
  drop_na()
```

# Calc DO Metrics

```{r}
# Daily metrics
dailyDO <- allDat %>% 
  mutate(Date = floor_date(solar.time, "1 day")) %>%
  group_by(Date, siteName) %>%
  summarize(
    minDO.obs = min(DO.obs, na.rm = T),
    maxDO.obs = max(DO.obs, na.rm = T),
    minDO.sat = min(DO.sat, na.rm = T),
    maxDO.sat = max(DO.sat, na.rm = T),
    minDO.pctsat = min(DO.pctsat, na.rm = T),
    maxDO.pctsat = max(DO.pctsat, na.rm = T),
    avgDO.obs = mean(DO.obs, na.rm = T),
    avgDO.sat = mean(DO.sat, na.rm = T),
    avgDO.pctsat = mean(DO.pctsat, na.rm = T),
    totalDO = n(),
    DO.hyp = sum(DO.obs <= 2, na.rm = T)
    ) %>% 
  mutate(DO.amp = maxDO.obs - minDO.obs,
         DOsat.amp = maxDO.sat - minDO.sat,
         DOpctsat.amp = maxDO.pctsat - minDO.pctsat,
         probHyp = DO.hyp / totalDO)

#nighttime hypoxia ratio
nightHypRat <- allDat %>% 
  mutate(Date = floor_date(solar.time, "1 day")) %>%
  group_by(Date, siteName, isDaytime) %>% 
  summarise(DO.hyp = sum(DO.obs <= 2, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = isDaytime, values_from = DO.hyp, names_prefix = "DO_hyp_") %>%
  rename(DayHyp = DO_hyp_TRUE, NightHyp = DO_hyp_FALSE) %>% 
  mutate(NHR = NightHyp / DayHyp)

#Merge DO Metrics
doMet <- dailyDO %>% 
  full_join(nightHypRat, by = c("Date", "siteName"))
```

# Calc Hydro Metrics

```{r}
#Flag wet and dry, find change between wet and dry period, and group each wet period into a group
usgsQ <- usgsQ %>%
  mutate(status = ifelse(Q_cms > 0, "wet", "dry")) %>%
  group_by(siteName) %>%
  mutate(change = status != lag(status, default = first(status)),
         group = cumsum(change),
         duration = 1:n()) %>%
  group_by(siteName, group) %>%
  mutate(duration = n()) %>%
  ungroup()


# Calculate drying metrics
wetDur <- usgsQ %>%
  filter(status == "wet") %>%
  group_by(siteName, group) %>%
  mutate(peakDayIndex = which.max(Q_cms),
         timeSincePeak = row_number() - peakDayIndex,
         startDate = min(Date),
         endDate = max(Date)) %>%
  mutate(logQ = log(Q_cms)) %>%
  filter(!is.infinite(logQ) & !is.nan(logQ)) %>%
  do({
    linearModel = lm(logQ ~ timeSincePeak, data = .)
    slope = coef(linearModel)[["timeSincePeak"]]
    data.frame(., recessionRate = slope)
  }) %>%
  summarize(startDate = min(Date),
            endDate = max(Date),
            minQ = min(Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE),
            avgQ = mean(Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE),
            maxQ = max(Q_cms),
            numWetDays = n(), 
            peakToDryDays = abs(first(timeSincePeak)),
            peakQuantile = first(flowQuantile[which.max(Q_cms)]),
            dryingRate = first(recessionRate)) %>%
  filter(numWetDays > 10)

```

## Merge DO metrics and Q

```{r}
allDat <- allDat %>%
  mutate(status = ifelse(Q_cms > 0, "wet", "dry")) %>%
  group_by(siteName) %>%
  mutate(change = status != lag(status, default = first(status)),
         group = cumsum(change),
         duration = 1:n()) %>%
  group_by(siteName, group) %>%
  mutate(duration = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

# Calculate all metrics
testDur <- allDat %>%
  #filter(status == "wet") %>%
  group_by(siteName, group) %>%
  mutate(peakDayIndex = which.max(Q_cms),
         timeSincePeak = row_number() - peakDayIndex,
         startDate = min(Date),
         endDate = max(Date)) %>%
  mutate(logQ = log(Q_cms)) %>%
  summarise(minDO.obs = min(DO.obs, na.rm = T),
            maxDO.obs = max(DO.obs, na.rm = T),
            minDO.sat = min(DO.sat, na.rm = T),
            maxDO.sat = max(DO.sat, na.rm = T),
            minDO.pctsat = min(DO.pctsat, na.rm = T),
            maxDO.pctsat = max(DO.pctsat, na.rm = T),
            avgDO.obs = mean(DO.obs, na.rm = T),
            avgDO.sat = mean(DO.sat, na.rm = T),
            avgDO.pctsat = mean(DO.pctsat, na.rm = T),
            totalDO = n(),
            DO.hyp = sum(DO.obs <= 2, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(logQ) & !is.nan(logQ)) %>%
  do({
    linearModel = lm(logQ ~ timeSincePeak, data = .)
    slope = coef(linearModel)[["timeSincePeak"]]
    data.frame(., recessionRate = slope)
  }) %>%
  summarize(startDate = min(Date),
            endDate = max(Date),
            minQ = min(Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE),
            avgQ = mean(Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE),
            maxQ = max(Q_cms),
            numWetDays = n(), 
            peakToDryDays = abs(first(timeSincePeak)),
            peakQuantile = first(flowQuantile[which.max(Q_cms)]),
            dryingRate = first(recessionRate)) %>%
  mutate(DO.amp = maxDO.obs - minDO.obs,
         DOsat.amp = maxDO.sat - minDO.sat,
         DOpctsat.amp = maxDO.pctsat - minDO.pctsat,
         probHyp = DO.hyp / totalDO) %>% 
  filter(numWetDays > 10)
```
